# Engineering Log — Shared Project Instructions

## Project Overview

This is a **personal engineering log** for on-call, SRE, and technical analysis work, primarily at Eneco's Trade Platform (VPP). It is a **markdown-only knowledge repo** — no compilable code, no deployable artifacts. Content includes holistic RCAs, incident logs, technical proposals, troubleshooting documents, and engineering notes.

Primary write pattern: ingest an incident or analysis request → investigate → produce a structured log entry with evidence labels, context ledger, and durable lessons.

## Startup Read-Head [READ FIRST]

BEFORE ANY work, load the vertical slice for your task area:

1. `.ai/runtime/second-brain/recall-bundle.md` — read FIRST when present; do not replace DDD or scoped lessons
2. `.ai/harness/ddd-project.md` — project identity, log structure, on-call workflow, gotchas
3. `.ai/harness/ddd-ubiquitous-language.md` — Eneco VPP domain vocabulary (VPP, FBE, ArgoCD, etc.)
4. `.ai/memory/lessons-learned.json` — filter by `scope` matching files you're touching, high severity first
5. **Second Brain** (`$SECOND_BRAIN_PATH/llm-wiki/` or `$SECOND_BRAIN_VAULT_LOCAL/llm-wiki/`) — read `memory/`, `active/handoffs/`, `active/tasks/`, `context/repos/`, `learnings/gotchas/` for task-relevant notes
6. `.ai/harness-health-report.md` if present — fix before other work
7. `.ai/harness/rules/RULES.md` — load only rules whose globs match task files
8. `git log --oneline -10 -- {task-area-path}` — recent changes in the area

Detailed mandate: `.ai/harness/rules/governance/anchor-context-startup.md`

## Log Structure

```
log/employer/eneco/
  00_incident_sre/        # Alert analysis, runbooks, fix proposals
  01_trade_platform_team/ # Team-scoped docs (FAQ, troubleshooting guide)
  02_on_call_shift/       # On-call incident logs — one dir per shift/incident
  asset-scheduler-integration-vpp/
  github_implementation/
  ...

engineering/              # Technical design documents, proposals
docs/guides/              # How-to guides and analysis protocols
scratchpad/               # Draft notes

.ai/harness/              # Harness centralized files (DDD, rules, skills)
.ai/memory/               # Persistent memory (lessons-learned.json)
.ai/tasks/                # Task workspaces (.ai/tasks/{task_id}_{slug}/)
.ai/runtime/              # Runtime state (recall bundle, per-session current-task sentinels)
```

## On-Call Log Convention

Each incident gets: `log/employer/eneco/02_on_call_shift/{YYYY_MM_DD}_{slug}/`
Files: `context.md`, `rca.md`, `fix.md`, `slack-intake.txt` (plus evidence files).
RCAs follow the holistic-RCA structure: context ledger, L1-L12 layers, A1/A2/A3 evidence labels.

## Markdown Style

- Use ONLY kebab-case for filenames (e.g., `my-analysis.md`)
- Use `_` underscores for directory names (e.g., `02_on_call_shift/`)
- Always specify language on fenced code blocks
- Use YAML frontmatter on structured documents under `docs/`
- Use Mermaid for system diagrams (`\`\`\`mermaid`)
- Proper header hierarchy — never skip levels
- No trailing spaces; blank lines around headers and code blocks

See `.ai/harness/rules/markdown/` for full markdown rules.

## Domain Rules

MUST use Eneco VPP domain terms from `.ai/harness/ddd-ubiquitous-language.md`.
MUST NOT invent synonyms for domain terms (e.g., do not call "FBE" a "tool" or "pipeline" without context).
See `.ai/harness/rules/domain/` for on-call workflow rules.

## Security Constraints

- NEVER commit secrets, tokens, credentials, or `.env` files
- NEVER include actual Eneco internal service bus URLs, storage SAS tokens, or key vault secrets in log files
- Redact sensitive values as `[REDACTED]` before saving

## Persistent Memory

- READ `.ai/memory/lessons-learned.json` before work — check `scope` field against files you'll touch
- UPDATE after work — add new LL-{NNN} entries for durable discoveries
- When Second Brain is available: dual-path writes (markdown companion first, then JSON entry)
- Format: see `.ai/harness/rules/governance/memory-freshness.md`

## Task Workspace

- Allocate task IDs with `.ai/harness/scripts/claim-task-id.sh <slug>`; NEVER list existing tasks and pick the next number manually
- Write task artifacts under `.ai/tasks/{task_id}_{slug}/`
- Publish per-session state to `.ai/runtime/current-task/{session_id}.json`; the legacy singleton `.ai/runtime/current-task.json` is inert compatibility residue
- Add exact absolute external paths to the current task manifest `allowed_external_paths` before writing outside the repo
- See `.ai/harness/rules/governance/task-workspace.md`

## Agent Configuration

| Agent | Root File | Rules | Skills |

| Claude Code | CLAUDE.md | .claude/rules/ | .claude/skills/ |
| Cursor | — | .cursor/rules/ | .cursor/skills/ |

See `.ai/harness/rules/RULES.md` for full rule index and glob mappings.
Key rule namespaces: `governance/` `structure/` `markdown/` `domain/`
